This report maps repo-local hook policy, hook specs, and ignored executable-looking handlers to body-free git provenance. It reports paths, counts, hashes, tracked state, dirty state, last commit IDs/dates, and commit-subject hashes only; hook bodies, handler bodies, issue bodies, comments, prompts, git subjects, author identities, provider payloads, and secret values are not included.
